title: Substrate schema validation rejects items missing optional fields
description: When writing a block with schema validation, fields declared as required in the schema are enforced. This is correct. However, the error messages reference array indices (e.g., '/feedback/10: must have required property status') rather than the item's id field. For blocks with many items, debugging which item failed requires cross-referencing the index.
actual_behavior: append-block-item rejected FB-011 with '/feedback/10: must have required property status' — useful but requires counting items to identify the offending entry.
expected_behavior: Error messages should include the item's id field when present: '/feedback/FB-011: must have required property status'.
reproduction: 1. append-block-item with missing required field. 2. Observe error references array index, not item id.
